fields.title: Make $ skill marker work with all discovered skills
fields.description: Update tau skill-marker so $ uses the same discovered skill set as pi's main skill registry, including extension-provided skills such as extensions/tau/skills. Add regression tests and verify with gate.,cwd:/home/ribelo/projects/ribelo/tau}},{
fields.close_reason: Updated skill-marker to refresh from active skill commands so $ sees the same discovered skills as pi, and added bundled tau-skills fallback before resource discovery completes. Added regression tests and ran gate successfully.
